claims.summary: Peripheral previews may read enough file content to create synchronous latency.
claims.disposition: Verified previews stop at 200 Unicode scalars with a bounded byte read, including explicit large-file and UTF-8 boundary tests.

claims.summary: Directories with many entries may be fully enumerated or cause an out-of-bounds candidate removal.
claims.disposition: Verified each directory candidate reads only entries.next(), and candidate indexing is reduced modulo a nonempty length before swap_remove.

claims.summary: High-cardinality directories and nearby 29/31 states should be measured for latency and resonance diversity.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded read-only fixture comparing 100-plus-entry directories and adjacent fill states without changing cadence.

claims.summary: Async caching or warmth/rest overrides could make the cycle feel less heavy.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because caching, warmth override, rest timing, or cadence changes alter live autonomous selection behavior.
